findings.title: Closeout evidence was not present in the review diff
findings.disposition: Evidence files are now recorded under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m07-s08 and final validation is rerun after materialization.

findings.title: Contract enum copies needed exact-length validation
findings.disposition: scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now checks exact status and owner_role enum copy lengths.

findings.title: Audit reference trim check is redundant with regex anchoring
findings.disposition: The explicit trim check is intentionally retained for clearer fail-closed error messages.

findings.title: Required-field presence accepted inherited properties
findings.disposition: validateControlPlaneStateEnumRegistryRequiredFields now uses Object.hasOwn for required-field presence.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S08 required-field-registry slice with no P0/P1, no improper S09/S10/S11 completion, and no new enum value definition. The only P2 required recording actual closeout evidence after review.
